provenance.claim: These hashes describe the reviewed owner-supplied working-tree files. They do not claim that the complete snapshot, or unrelated dirty files, belonged to the base commit.
provenance.authorization: The repository owner explicitly requested this local UI adaptation for Edecan.

rules: No FyDesign authentication, database, SaaS API route, secret, credential, environment file, or host path was copied.
All project operations use Edecan's authenticated /v1/content/studio/actions contract.
Untrusted HTML is downloaded through Edecan file authorization and rendered with a no-script CSP and an empty iframe sandbox.

inventory.adaptation: Rebuilt as a responsive secure canvas with fit/zoom, point selection, annotations, fullscreen, authenticated artifact download, and variant switching supplied by the workspace. Removed inline HTML, clipboard/source exposure, new-tab blobs, allow-scripts, and allow-same-origin.
Preserved freehand, rectangle, circle, arrow, colors, clearing, pointer/touch drawing, and natural-language annotation summaries; kept all annotation state local.
Converted direct DOM editing into coordinate-based contextual requests that create a reversible backend revision without weakening iframe isolation.
Preserved dynamic toggle, slider, color, and select controls; values compile into one natural edit instruction and are applied as a new revision.
Replaced browser-only database models with tenant-scoped API projects and revisions; replaced deletion with explicitly confirmed archive/restore.
Reduced preflight to three human decisions plus dimensions, with Spanish labels and direct mapping to the stable Studio contract.
Preserved Cmd/Ctrl+K, search, groups, keyboard navigation, shortcuts, and accessible dialog semantics; commands call Edecan actions only.
Removed the original /api/templates dependency and thumbnail URLs; lists and instantiates private Edecan templates through the Studio API.
Preserved previous/next/version navigation and mapped branching to an explicit reversible duplicate operation.

Recomposed the interaction model under /app/studio with natural creative intents, private attachments, project/template sidebars, deterministic image-first previews, editable HTML artifacts, responsive drawers, and the authenticated Edecan API. Original auth, SaaS database, design-system API, and server routes were not ported.
